title: Pantry for Blockheads
description: We have food mod at home. The missing counterpart to Cooking for Blockheads.
body:
This mod adds 14 new crops and 48 new meals to the game, balanced for variety without bloat. For processed food like Cheese or Tofu, it adds a new Artisan Press block. Some foods will grant a "Well Fed" status effect for extra health. Alternatively, try a Fortune Cookie to see where your luck lies this day.

The seeds for these crops are obtained through chest loot, trading, or a Farming for Blockheads market.

This mod is available for NeoForge and Fabric. It requires Balm, which must be installed alongside the mod.

  • 14 new crops, from tomatoes to eggplants
  • 2 new fruit trees and berry bushes that generate in the world
  • 40+ meals, featuring a Well Fed effect, Fortune Cookies and Sprinkles of Magic
  • Artisan Press for making Cheese, Tofu and more
  • Utensils to place inside your Cooking for Blockheads kitchen
  • Integration with Farming for Blockheads and Little Joys
